content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback loop as a 'single-perspective bootstrap' that can be augmented by LLM self-reflection mechanisms’ multi-perspective inconsistency sampling to create a hybrid refinement framework that still requires no additional training or labeled data. This framework would first generate multiple inconsistent draft outputs from different implicit problem-solving perspectives, then iteratively refine each draft via self-feedback before selecting the highest-consistency, highest-quality final output.
